splits.title: Lesson III. Genealogy - History Beginnings in Europe
splits.start_boundary: HISTORY BEGINNINGS IN EUROPE. We have considered
splits.end_boundary: Note. The class should have a good map

files.notes: This file contains two lesson sections merged together. The first lesson (Work and Business) appears to be incomplete with only the header present. The second lesson (Genealogy) is a complete lesson about European history beginnings with detailed content about various European tribes and peoples, ending with study questions.
